```js title=index.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["index"], {
"./foo.js"(module) {
module.exports = "foo";


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
"use strict";
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _foo_js__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./foo.js");
/* import */ var _foo_js__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_foo_js__rspack_import_0);

__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "parent-1_js").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./parent-1.js", 23));
__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "parent-2_js").then(__rspack_require.t.bind(__rspack_require, "./parent-2.js", 23));


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```

```js title=parent-1_js.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["parent-1_js"], {
"./parent-1.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "shared_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./shared.js"));


},

}]);
```

```js title=parent-2_js.js
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["parent-2_js"], {
"./parent-2.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "shared_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./shared.js"));


},

}]);
```

```js title=shared_js.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["shared_js"], {
"./shared.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./foo.js");
/* import */ var _foo__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_foo__rspack_import_0);
// should not contain foo as ancestor already has

console.log("shared");


},

}]);
```
